THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court announces the tentative ruling to grant the unopposed motion. Counsel informs the Court she has received verified responses. The court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

DEFENDANT 28 MIS OWNER LLC's Motion To Compel Responses From Plaintiff Ramiro Gutierrez Ortiz To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Documents, Set One.

Off-calendar per request of the moving party and approval of the Court.

Judge Pro Tem: John Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM
Jason Lundberg, Esq., ALLEGIANCE LAW, 415-404-6395, for Plaintiff
Salvatore Picariello, Esq. FORTIS LLP 714-839-3800 spicariello@fortislaw.com for Defendant TOUCHSTONE COMMERCIAL PARTNERS, INC.
Saima Aslam,Esq., WILSON, ELSER, MOSKOWITZ, EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (415) 434-1370, Saima.Aslam@wilsonelser.com for Defendant 28 MIS OWNER, LLC

Matter is not contested. Discussed. Coounsel for Defendant 28 Mis Owner LLC seeks to address certain discovery issues. Court indicates that the discovery issues raised are not before him in regards to todays motion and the issues raised by defense counsel are not considered.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAMIRO GUTIERREZ ORTIZ, AN INDIVIDUAL MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Granted as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order using the Mandatory JCC Form MC-053.
